name: Speedy Little Devils
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:20
Combine the melted butter and dry cake mix. Let the butter cool for a few minutes before adding it to the dry mix. The mixture should be crumbly. If the butter is too hot, the result will be a sticky mass rather than a crumbly mixture.
Reserve about 1 - 1/2 cups of this mixture for topping. Pat the remaining crumb mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
Combine the peanut butter and marshmallow cream and spread evenly over the crumb mixture in the pan.
Crumble the reserved 1 - 1/2 cups of cake mixture over the peanut butter/marshmallow creme layer. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F. Let cool, cut into bars, and serve one piece at a time. Makes 3 dozen bars. From: Best Recipes.
